definition: Chinese Treasury holdings reduction (from ~$1.08T to ~$770B) is geopolitically motivated and qualitatively irreversible, unlike Japanese selling which is economically motivated and potentially reversible. Chinese selling accelerates under stress (e.g., ~$40B decline during August 2023 US-China tensions).
evidence: Destination: gold, EM bonds, bilateral swaps
TIC data and behavior under stress distinguish geopolitical from economic motivation
open_questions: Difficult to distinguish SAFE portfolio rebalancing (reversible) from geopolitical hedging (irreversible) using TIC data alone
n=1 for the geopolitical acceleration claim
What is the terminal level of Chinese holdings?
